title: Another bad backup
description:
### Describe the bug
Seems not related to https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/issues/84711 and https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/issues/81871
### How to reproduce
Set `default` as an allowed disk, then run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c1 Map(Int,Int), c2 Int) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple() PARTITION BY (c1, c2 % 6084);
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c1, c2) SELECT map(), 2 FROM numbers(100);
SET min_insert_block_size_rows = 64, optimize_trivial_insert_select = 1;
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c1, c2) SELECT c1, c2 FROM generateRandom('c1 Map(Int,Int), c2 Int', 2607967781039168224, 1, 1) LIMIT 400;
BACKUP TABLE t0 TO Disk('default', 'b0.tar');
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Error> BackupsWorker: Failed to make backup Disk('default', 'b0.tar'): Code: 642. DB::Exception: Couldn't pack tar archive: Failed to write all bytes, 0 of 65448, filename='.backup'. (CANNOT_PACK_ARCHIVE), Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: Poco::Exception::Exception(String const&, int) @ 0x00000000247d85b2
1. src/Common/Exception.cpp:129: DB::Exception::Exception(DB::Exception::MessageMasked&&, int, bool) @ 0x0000000014ff0069
2. src/Common/Exception.h:123: DB::Exception::Exception(String&&, int, String, bool) @ 0x000000000d50e30e
3. src/Common/Exception.h:58: DB::Exception::Exception(PreformattedMessage&&, int) @ 0x000000000d50dd11
4. src/Common/Exception.h:141: DB::Exception::Exception<long&, long&, String>(int, FormatStringHelperImpl<std::type_identity<long&>::type, std::type_identity<long&>::type, std::type_identity<String>::type>, long&, long&, String&&) @ 0x000000001980dd36
5. src/IO/Archives/LibArchiveWriter.cpp:93: DB::LibArchiveWriter::WriteBufferFromLibArchive::nextImpl() @ 0x000000001980d9f4
6. src/IO/WriteBuffer.h:53: DB::WriteBuffer::next() @ 0x000000000d51b59e
7. src/IO/Archives/LibArchiveWriter.cpp:74: DB::LibArchiveWriter::WriteBufferFromLibArchive::finalizeImpl() @ 0x000000001980d849
8. src/IO/WriteBuffer.cpp:95: DB::WriteBuffer::finalize() @ 0x00000000150f19f0
9. src/Backups/BackupImpl.cpp:437: DB::BackupImpl::writeBackupMetadata() @ 0x00000000197fdee9
10. src/Backups/BackupImpl.cpp:1085: DB::BackupImpl::finalizeWriting() @ 0x0000000019804969
11. src/Backups/BackupsWorker.cpp:675: DB::BackupsWorker::doBackup(std::shared_ptr<DB::IBackup>, std::shared_ptr<DB::ASTBackupQuery> const&, String const&, DB::BackupSettings const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IBackupCoordination>, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context>, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const> const&, bool, std::shared_ptr<DB::Cluster> const&) @ 0x00000000197db8e6
12. src/Backups/BackupsWorker.cpp:462: DB::BackupsWorker::BackupStarter::doBackup() @ 0x00000000197e91d0
13. src/Backups/BackupsWorker.cpp:551: void std::__function::__policy_invoker<void ()>::__call_impl[abi:se190107]<std::__function::__default_alloc_func<DB::BackupsWorker::startMakingBackup(std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const> const&)::$_0, void ()>>(std::__function::__policy_storage const*) @ 0x00000000197e400c
14. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:716: ? @ 0x00000000167c8204
15. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/future:1589: std::packaged_task<void ()>::operator()() @ 0x00000000167c8377
16. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:716: ? @ 0x0000000015133693
17. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__type_traits/invoke.h:117: ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>::ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<void (ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool::*)(), ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool*>(void (ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool::*&&)(), ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool*&&)::'lambda'()::operator()() @ 0x0000000015139d66
18. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:716: ? @ 0x0000000015130b26
19. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__type_traits/invoke.h:117: void* std::__thread_proxy[abi:se190107]<std::tuple<std::unique_ptr<std::__thread_struct, std::default_delete<std::__thread_struct>>, void (ThreadPoolImpl<std::thread>::ThreadFromThreadPool::*)(), ThreadPoolImpl<std::thread>::ThreadFromThreadPool*>>(void*) @ 0x0000000015137540
20. start_thread @ 0x00000000000a27f1
21. __clone3 @ 0x0000000000133b5c
(version 25.11.1.243 (official build))
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR(255), value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t1 (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'test', 3.14), (2, 'example', NULL), (3, 'sample', 2.71);
CREATE TABLE t2 AS SELECT * FROM t1;
INSERT INTO t2 SELECT id, name, value + 1.0, created_at FROM t1 WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Backup fails when using 'default' as allowed disk
